DataRequest.Name: Heavy TCP Port Scan: Single Destination - 5mnt / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects a host performing a port scan - this involves excessive permitted TCP connections from the same source to many distinct ports on a host in a short period of time. The thresholds are at least 30 distinct ports in a 5 minute window
DataRequest.IncidentTitle: Heavy TCP Port Scan from $srcIpAddr to $destIpAddr

SubPattern.name: Filter1
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitTraffic) AND ipProto=6 AND srcIpPort>=1024 AND srcIpAddr NOT IN (Group@PH_SYS_APP_ACCELOPS) AND srcIpAddr IN (Group@PH_SYS_NETWORK_ENTERPRISE_INTERNAL_NET)
